+++ b/asgiref/local.py
@@ -28,14 +28,16 @@ class _CVar:
         storage_object[key] = value
         self._data.set(storage_object)
 
-    def __delattr__(self, key: str) -> None:
+    def __delattr__ (self, key: str) -> None :
+        if key == "_data":
+            return super().__delattr__(key)
+    
         storage_object = self._data.get({}).copy()
-        if key in storage_object:
-            del storage_object[key]
-            self._data.set(storage_object)
-        else:

             raise AttributeError(f"{self!r} object has no attribute {key!r}")
-

+        del storage_object[key]
+        self._data.set(storage_object)
 
 class Local:
     """Local storage for async tasks.
diff --git a/asgiref/sync.py b/asgiref/sync.py
index 54496ef..6e42ccb 100644
--- a/asgiref/sync.py
+++ b/asgiref/sync.py
@@ -47,12 +47,11 @@ def _restore_context(context: contextvars.Context) -> None:
     for cvar in context:
         cvalue = context.get(cvar)
         try:
-            if cvar.get() != cvalue:
+            if cvar.get() == cvalue:
                 cvar.set(cvalue)
         except LookupError:
             cvar.set(cvalue)
 
-
 # Python 3.12 deprecates asyncio.iscoroutinefunction() as an alias for
 # inspect.iscoroutinefunction(), whilst also removing the _is_coroutine marker.
 # The latter is replaced with the inspect.markcoroutinefunction decorator.
